title: Bhimgad Fort
tagline: Bhimgad Fort — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Bhimgad Fort are historical ruins located within the Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary, on a detached spur of the Western Ghats, in Khanapur Taluk of Belgaum District near Jamboti Village
overview.description: Bhimgad Fort are historical ruins located within the Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary, on a detached spur of the Western Ghats, in Khanapur Taluk of Belgaum District near Jamboti Village, Karnataka state, India. It is located in the heart of the Mhadei river watershed. It was built and occupied by ch.Shivaji maharaj in the mid 17th century during his conquest of South India to defend from the Portuguese colonial troops who controlled Goa at that time.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Sonsogor
topPlaces.description: Sonsogor, or Sonsogod, is the highest peak in the state of Goa, India, at an elevation of 1,026 metres (3,366 feet) above sea level. It is located at the trijunction of Sattari taluka, North Goa district and Khanapur taluka, Belagavi district, and Joida taluka, Uttara Kannada district, Karnataka state, It is a part of the Western Ghats mountain range in Goa's Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary.

topPlaces.name: Mendil
topPlaces.description: Mendil is a village in Belgaum district of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in the Western Ghats, in Khanapur Taluk of Belgavi District near Jamboti Village, Karnataka state, India. This 19,042.58 ha (73.5238 mi2) of Tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests forest area was long awaiting to be a wild life sanctuary and finally declared in December 2011.

topPlaces.name: Akheti
topPlaces.description: Akheti is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Supa taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

items.note: Sonsogor, or Sonsogod, is the highest peak in the state of Goa, India, at an elevation of 1,026 metres (3,366 feet) above sea level. It is located at the trijunction of Sattari taluka, North Goa district and Khanapur taluka, Belagavi district, and Joida taluka, Uttara Kannada district, Karnataka state, It is a part of the Western Ghats mountain range in Goa's Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary.
Mendil is a village in Belgaum district of Karnataka, India.

Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in the Western Ghats, in Khanapur Taluk of Belgavi District near Jamboti Village, Karnataka state, India. This 19,042.58 ha (73.5238 mi2) of Tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests forest area was long awaiting to be a wild life sanctuary and finally declared in December 2011.
Akheti is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Supa taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhimgad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhimgad Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhimgad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (51 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhimgad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhimgad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhimgad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Bhimgad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhimgad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sonsogor, Mendil, Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary, Akheti.
